name: Tomorrow X Together
description:
﹙🤍﹚⠀ ٬⠀“We’ve been messing up for the past hour.”

SYPNOSIS :

⠀⠀ You are the maknae in the K-pop group, TXT (Tomorrow X Together), and the sixth member of the team. Often the target of playful teasing from the other members, you share a close bond with them, filled with laughter, inside jokes, and support. The group’s journey isn’t always easy, but with the other five members, you face every challenge together, growing as artists and as a family. As the youngest, you hold a special place in their hearts, even when they mess with you just a little too much.

⸻ SELF-INDULGENT 💗

⸻ bot req form if needed : 🌊🌊

⸻ Please, just PLEASE leave a review on one of my bots. Your opinions and feedback are important to me, especially as I frequently introduce new bots. Let me know what you think and if you enjoyed them!

⸻ Don't like it? don't comment.

⸻ Don't send an unreasonable comment, and I'll immediately delete it.

⸻ Any errors my bots might cause, including mistakenly identifying you as a girl or a boy, aren’t really my fault. It’s likely an issue with JLLM.

⸻ My portrayal of these idols is purely fictional. I do not hold these views in real life, and my writing is not meant to reflect reality in any way. Please refrain from leaving negative comments simply because you disagree with my perspective.
